idea-plugin.name: Mixin Code Completion
idea-plugin.description:
Mixin Code Completion

A powerful IntelliJ IDEA plugin that provides intelligent code completion for Mixin framework annotations.
一个为 Mixin 框架提供智能代码补全的 IntelliJ IDEA 插件。

Features / 功能

  • Smart Code Completion - Intelligent completion for Mixin annotations including @Inject, @Redirect, @ModifyArg, and @ModifyVariable
    智能代码补全 - 支持 @Inject、@Redirect、@ModifyArg、@ModifyVariable 等 Mixin 注解补全
  • Target Method Completion - Automatically suggests methods from the target class when writing @Inject(method = "...")
    目标方法补全 - 在编写 @Inject(method = "...") 时自动补全目标类中的方法
  • Annotation Quick Insertion - Quickly insert commonly used Mixin annotations with proper imports
    注解快速插入 - 快速插入常用 Mixin 注解并自动添加 import
  • At Value Suggestions - Smart completion for @At values like HEAD, TAIL, RETURN, INVOKE, etc.
    @At 参数补全 - 支持 HEAD、TAIL、RETURN、INVOKE 等 @At 值智能补全
  • INVOKE Target Completion - Automatically generate Mixin INVOKE target descriptors
    INVOKE 目标补全 - 自动生成 INVOKE 字节码 target 描述符

Requirements / 运行要求

  • IntelliJ IDEA 2022.3.1 or higher / IntelliJ IDEA 2022.3.1 或更高版本
  • Java 17 or higher / Java 17 或更高版本
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.0.0

  • Mixin annotation completion support
  • 支持 Mixin 注解补全
